refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns a LineString representing the exterior ring of a Polygon.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a LINESTRING representing the exterior ring (shell) of a POLYGON. Returns NULL if the geometry is not a polygon.

note.para: This function does not support MULTIPOLYGONs. For MULTIPOLYGONs use in conjunction with or

refsection.title: Examples
